prompt: Can you give me a timeline of when JavaScript frameworks were most popular? I want to understand the history of frontend development from jQuery through React.
I need to research the origin story and founding team behind Kubernetes. Who created it, what was the internal Google project it came from, and what were the key design decisions?
Can you remotely observe what's happening on our staging server right now? I want to see the live request patterns without SSHing in.
I want to know the legendary backstory of why our company chose PostgreSQL over MySQL. Everyone tells a different version. Can you find out the 'real' story by surveying current team members?
Tell me about the history and evolution of REST API design patterns from 2005 to present. I'm writing a blog post about API design trends.
I need to monitor our competitor's public API to see if they change their endpoints. Set up something that watches their OpenAPI spec URL and alerts us when it changes.
